prediction.reasoning: Based on AAPL's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.5-2% daily), I applied a 7-day forecast assuming normal distribution of returns. Confidence intervals widen progressively to account for increasing uncertainty, with the 7-day standard deviation estimated at approximately 4-5% of current price based on typical AAPL volatility patterns.
